author: Mohammed Hussain
description: Watch YouTube videos in the right sidebar while you take notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: msh
manifest.description: Watch YouTube videos in the right sidebar while you take notes.
manifest.name: YouTube Panel

name: YouTube Panel

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial community release.

## Features
- Compact 16:9 YouTube player in the right sidebar (privacy-enhanced youtube-nocookie.com embed)
- Persistent video queue with auto-advance when a video ends
- Built-in YouTube search (no API key) — Enter to queue, Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to play
- Play or queue links from notes via commands and the editor context menu
- Play from clipboard command (reads the clipboard only when invoked)
- Supports watch/youtu.be/Shorts/live/playlist URLs, timestamps, and bare video ids
- Remembers the last video across restarts

Release assets are built and attested by GitHub Actions from this repository.
